reviews.review_text: Workers were warm and welcoming. Provided proper care and cheaper alternatives to products.
Mike was very friendly, professional, and genuine. The processed worked and my tattoo is gone. Thank you to Medermis

This place is a miracle! I have really fair skin and had tattoos with thick black lines and dark pigmented color. I was skeptical of the results because of the color and my skin but the tattoos are completely gone! Mike is great, he is comforting and explains the procedure and aftercare completely. It's a long process but worth the wait and results. Highly recommend!

Mike is amazing!
Beautiful office, easy location to get too, and extremely clean!  Mike explained everything before we started so there was no questions about what to expect. I had an amazing experience and recommend everyone who has a tattoo that needs removing come here!

This place is a hidden Gem for those who are looking to remove some or all of a tattoo!!!💜💜💜 Mike is the best, super knowledgeable and kind. He has had his own tattoos removed as well and tells you what to expect.  I can't iterate enough how ecstatic I am about my results. I had a huge very deep tattoo and I really can't believe with every session I go to how this is even possible. I cant wait to remove the rest. This place for me is a 10/10
Have come to Austin location a few times as well and just like in San Antonio, I always leave feeling very pleased with my experience. My results have been fantastic! 10/10 recommend.

This place is a good as it can get for a very uncomfortable experience (lol). Mo is super cool and easy to talk to, sessions don't last long (depending on how big your tat is), and the process is super easy. Plus, there's a discount for some professions :)
Working with Michael over many many sessions was a great experience! He’s very caring, kind and meticulous. I’m very pleased with the excellent results. I can’t say enough good things about MEDermis.

I had a tattoo done in March of this year that did not turn out as expected. I had a consultation with Mike 4 weeks later and these are my results (before and after) early November after 3 sessions right before my last session. The pain level and cost were both lower than I thought they’d be and sessions took less than 10 minutes each. Mike and team were always super nice and fast with their text responses. I hope I never have to go back, but I could not recommend them more if you find yourself in a situation where you need a tattoo removed.
Very professional, friendly and clean. I have had several treatments and am very pleased by the awesome results!! The staff is great and I highly recommend MEDermis for your laser treatments.

They are the BEST! I’ve used them for several removals over the last 20 years. Mike and staff are very knowledgeable and explain everything in detail. They use the top of the line laser as well which also makes a huge difference. Their pricing is also great! My sister, brother in law and friend have also used them per my recommendation. I can’t recommend them enough!
This place is the best! Michael is sooo friendly and helpful! Was able to get my first treatment while I was there for the consultation. Def recommend!!!

I had received a tattoo on my collarbone that had blown out immediately under the skin. I began the process of getting it removed last year and just wrapped up treatments. I am very impressed by the results, you can’t even see the ink anymore and the skin affected is slowly getting pigment back. Mike was very professional and made the experience easy and effortless. Highly recommend!

MEDermis is great, super easy to make an appointment. Mike is awesome. I would definitely recommend this place. I’ve have 4 sessions, each one was easy to schedule and the pricing was definitely reasonable.

Wanted to start the removal process for 2 tattoos on my chest and my husband wanted to remove some finger tattoos as well - my husband’s coworker referred us to this business and so thankful for that. We have both had a great experience since day 1 and most importantly, our tattoos are disappearing. Be aware that this is a commitment and it does hurt!! But the end result will be worth it.
Amazing results in a reasonable amount of time. The sessions were quick and efficient, and not too painful. I’d heal up within a week after each session. Very effective.

I had a small tattoo I've been wanting to get rid of for a while, so decided to go to MEDermis Tattoo Removal based off of the reviews online. The process was very simple, Michael reached out via email confirming the appointment after I went on their website.  We had a consultation and I was able to start the first treatment the same day. Luckily my tattoo only took 3 sessions and faded drastically. The treatment itself was painless, an ice pack was placed on the area prior to treatment which really helped by numbing the area. Michael was very professional and made me feel comfortable during the sessions. After care instructions were also helpful. They have a nurse on board if you ever needed one for questions or concerns, luckily I never did. The area healed nicely. I do recommend getting the calm/ correcting serum they offer. It felt nice going on first couple of days post treatment. Thanks again ! I'm glad my tattoo is gone :)

Mike is just wonderful! My overall experience has been great, and I came to him from a prior laser removal place due to his reviews and convenience in the south Austin area. Best decision! Will totally recommend to my friends; and if I need ever need to remove a tattoo again, I will surely go to him.

Had a few black ink tattoos removed here and I had a great experience! 4 treatments only and the tattoos are completely gone. I didn’t really know what to expect as far as how effective and efficient the treatments would be but they were great. Definitely would recommend MEDermis Laser to anyone in Austin looking to say goodbye to unwanted ink! Service was great and kind as well.

I'm very happy the way my tattoo is looking now
getting removed here ..
the guy who works there is very nice and friendly..
he is very great and make me feel comfortable every session I need ..
maybe two more and my tattoo will be dissappeared..
Thanks MEDermis...
100% recommend this place if u looking to remove your tattoos.

I've been here over many years to laser off an ill-placed tattoo I got as a teen. I don't go in as often as I could, so it's taken longer than usual. My tattoo was very dark with a range of colors, and done with a heavy hand. The tattoo is almost completely gone, giving me more freedom in outfit choice, and the dermabrasion keeps the skin healthy. I'm considering getting another removed as I'm so happy with Medermis. I would recommend to friends and family. Friendly and fast service, very professional.
I have been removing a tattoo and I am so happy with my service. Jordan is very thorough and really listens to my concerns. We collaborate on the path forward for my treatments. Highly recommend.

Mike and his team at MEDermis are amazing. I worked with him lighten three tattoos on my arm to the point where I can’t even tell there are tattoos under my cover ups.

I had been going somewhere else in the Austin area for removal services prior to MEDermis and was unhappy with the results. From the first session, I knew the process with him would be much more successful. Mike was extremely knowledgeable about the process and made me feel confident we would get my tattoos light enough.

Mike is great at explaining the process and what to expect during the actual laser session to the healing process.

I have recommended MEDermis to multiple friends and will continue to do so.

I cannot thank Mike enough!
I recommend this business, Jordan the technician is wonderful!

It was a pleasure working with Mike to remove a minor part of a jugular notch tattoo. I was able to book my first session within a month of barely getting the fresh tattoo (there were visible results just from the first session!) The process has been quick and convenient - from the consultation to scheduling to the laser session itself. Very affordable service that comes with a payment plan. You are prepped well before each session (which itself isn't too painful.) The healing process is easy which Mike ensures to educate you on. I have so far had 6 sessions completed and my ink has significantly disappeared. Expect professionalism and a friendly, comfortable environment when you book here. Could not thank Mike enough for helping me get rid of my regret. Would very highly recommend.
Amazing atmosphere and an amazing specialist who really cares! I wouldn’t go anywhere but here!

This is the very best place in Austin to get laser tattoo removal medermis will be highly knowledgeable and professional and make you feel right at home great customer service I’ve had 4 sessions so far with them looking forward too my next.

Mike is amazing. He explains everything that he does before he does it, he is patient, and answers all questions. He is so understanding if you need a second to breath during the treatments. I feel very comfortable with coming to MEDermis and will continue to do so for my future removals!
State of the art equipment, cleanliness of office and great prices.  Thank you Mike for taking the time to explain the entire process.  Prices are reasonable.  I would highly recommend this business.
I had two tattoos that I chose to ignore for years. I finally got them removed with MEDermis   The lasers really work and I was always surprised how much ink it took off each time.
awesome results great services fair prices why wait? definitely check this place out if you got regerts

I've been visiting MEDermis for about 7 months now for removal of a rather large black lined tattoo on my upper back. After 6 or 7 sessions, the tattoo has faded enough that I can't even see where the original piece was! Super professional experience, and although not the most comfortable thing to go through, would definitely come back for removal of another tattoo in the future.

This place is the real deal. I’ve had four sessions and my tattoo has lightened significantly. They’re knowledgeable and helpful and always available to answer questions. For sure go with this place if you’re trying to choose between here and a certain other chain in town.

Great customer service.  My skin type is medically prone to keloids and scarring but my tattoo removal has been the best.   I've had minimal to no blisters or scaring.  I'm thrilled with my results.  I think I have one more session.  History:  removal of lily (flower) from chest.  It was only one color and I had it over 15 years.  It was already fading.
They were amazing! They were informative and easy to work with. It’s a frustrating process and I had to be patient but I am so thankful I found them!

Highly recommend this office!  Mike is laid back and knowledgeable - he explained what to expect from the procedure and what each visit would entail.  Office is clean and friendly.   Again highly recommend Mike and his team.  Glad I found MEDermis Tattoo Removal!

I was so happy I came across Medermis, after calling for a few questions I felt completely comfortable as choosing them to do my tattoo removal. It was a great location, super friendly, answered all my questions & made me feel so comfortable. The price was definitely the best ive come across looking for a place. I have only had 1 treatment but already excited to have the next session. Im already very happy.
Highly recommend. Clean, hassle free and the discomfort of the laser is minimal :)

Mike was attentive and knowledgeable in the process and intensity to use on my skin type (Type 5 darker complexion). If he went in aggressive there was a higher probability that hypopigmentation (lightening of skin) would occur.  Something I wanted to avoid at all cost.  After multiple treatments I reached the point where the tattoo had lightened substantially and not my skin. I'll be back to see Mike for other removals in due time.

I have been receiving permanent make up removal treatments here for over a year. Mike is great we had a thorough conversation about what to expect and the risks involved in the laser treatments before we began. This was specially important because we would be working on a very delicate area- my face. This was the only office in the Austin area that agreed to work on my permanent make up tattoos, the others turned me down because it is such a delicate procedure. I highly recommend Medermis tattoo removal.

I couldn’t be anymore thrilled with the results and experience I had at MEDermis. Mike was super informative and professional, he prioritizes maintaining skin integrity which is so important for maximizing long term results. I urge you to come to this location for top care! 10/10

Very satisfied with my tattoo removal experience! Mike has been wonderfully patient with me from the start. Always quick (but throughout), professional, and personable. This office has made my tattoo removal experience as painless as possible!
Best experience I have ever had! Mike is awesome, he professional, kind, and his work is unbelievable! And reasonable prices!

My entire experience here has been nothing but great! They were so helpful in explaining the whole process and very professional. The facility was very clean easy to locate and the staff are so nice. Tattoo laser has a reputation of being painful but with their numbing methods I was amazed on how much it helped. 10/10 would referee anyone looking to get rid of an unwanted tattoo.

This is the best Tattoo Removal clinic in All Austin Tx
Most of my tattoos are almost completely gone because Mr.Mike is professional and will take care of you My skin is healthy and I have no big scars  I highly recommend this clinic for everyone that wants to get rid of your old ink and wants a new start. Mr.Mike will work with u on payment plans and I can also send pictures of before and after.

#1 in Austin Texas
Great service, alway done on schedule and very affordable. I highly recommend!!

darker_skin.label: Darker skin tone or Fitzpatrick V-VI mentioned

prior_laser_failed.label: Prior laser treatment mentioned as failed or insufficient

editorial_summary.outcome_positive: 22 of 50 reviews describe visible fading or a clear result
editorial_summary.pmu_removal: 1 of 50 reviews mention PMU or permanent makeup removal
editorial_summary.staff_positive: 26 of 50 reviews mention technicians or staff positively
editorial_summary.pain_mentioned: 8 of 50 reviews mention pain or discomfort
editorial_summary.scarring_mentioned: 2 of 50 reviews mention scarring or texture changes
editorial_summary.billing_complaint: 0 of 50 reviews mention billing or refund issues
editorial_summary.darker_skin: 1 of 50 reviews mention darker skin tone
editorial_summary.prior_laser_failed: 0 of 50 reviews mention prior laser treatment that didn't work
editorial_summary._note: Signal counts use 46 text reviews as extraction base. Editorial summaries reference 50 total reviews for page consistency.
